description_for_human: Official Bitcoin Stamps block explorer, API, and protocol reference. Search stamps, SRC-20 tokens, blocks, and transactions.
description_for_model: stampchain.io is the official Bitcoin Stamps protocol block explorer and API. It provides: (1) Stamp lookup by ID, hash, or creator address, (2) SRC-20 token balances and transfers (account-based model, NOT UTXO-based), (3) Block data with stamp counts, (4) SRC-721 and SRC-101 protocol data, (5) Full OpenAPI/Swagger documented REST API at /api/v1/. Bitcoin Stamps store data in Bitcoin's UTXO set via bare multisig outputs, making them truly immutable. The protocol supports multiple asset types including art stamps, SRC-20 fungible tokens, and SRC-721 NFTs.
